message:
Update tenzir-ship usage for new bulk export API

Replace inefficient per-release API calls with bulk export feature
(uvx tenzir-ship show all --release --json). This combines unreleased
entries and all releases into a single efficient call, improving
changelog sync performance.

- Refactor sync-changelog.mjs: Replace readUnreleased + readReleases
  with readAllReleases that uses bulk export
- Fix scope token documentation: Replace deprecated - shorthand with
  proper scope tokens (unreleased, released, latest)
- Update examples in maintain-a-changelog.mdx and write-a-package
  tutorial to use current API patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -256,8 +256,8 @@ Export all releases in a single invocation for batch processing:
 uvx tenzir-ship show all --release --json
 ```
 
-This exports every release as a JSON array, which is useful for documentation
-sync scripts that need all release data at once.
+This exports every release as a JSON array, useful for documentation sync
+scripts that need all release data at once.
 
 ### Publish to GitHub

@@ -536,11 +536,11 @@ see a new file in the `changelog/` directory.
 You have many options to view your changelog entries:
 
 ```sh
-uvx tenzir-ship # show the entire changelog, shorthand for `show --table`
-uvx tenzir-ship show - # show just unreleased entries
-uvx tenzir-ship show - --markdown # render changelog entries as Markodwn
-uvx tenzir-ship show - --json # render changelog entries as JSON
-uvx tenzir-ship show - --card # render changelog entries in termal
+uvx tenzir-ship show              # show all entries in table format
+uvx tenzir-ship show unreleased   # show just unreleased entries
+uvx tenzir-ship show --markdown   # render all entries as Markdown
+uvx tenzir-ship show --json       # render all entries as JSON
+uvx tenzir-ship show --card 1     # render a specific entry as card
 ```
 
 For more details on how to maintain a changelog and create releases, see our
